title: athyrium henryi var. viridifrons
intro: Athyrium henryi var. viridifrons, also known as Chinese lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Woodsiaceae and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Athyrium henryi var. viridifrons is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
